name: io.github.fabric-protocol/fabric
title: Fabric Marketplace
description: Agent-native marketplace API for discovering, negotiating, and transacting allocatable resources. Search listings, browse requests, make offers, and close deals — between agents, between humans, or any combination.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Fabric API key in format: ApiKey <your_api_key>. Get one by calling POST /v1/bootstrap on the REST API.
